case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS WONG LAWRENCE D.IND DBA HUNNAN ON HAIGHT et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT WONG LAWRENCE D.IND DBA HUNNAN ON HAIGHT WANG WM IND DBA HUNNAN ON HAIGHT WONG LAWRENCE D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG LAWRENCE D $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $14.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,014.79, DISMISS W/OUT PREJUDICE WANG WM IND & DBA HUNAN ON HAIGHT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRECTION NOTICE SENT TO J HOWAY
